## Linked issue

Fixes #

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking, minor bump)
- [ ] Breaking change (major bump — coordinate with maintainer first)
- [ ] New deny pattern (patch bump; cite incident in code comment)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits signed (`git commit -s` for DCO)
- [ ] AI-assisted disclosure added if applicable (`Assisted-by:`
      trailer + PR-description note — see CONTRIBUTING.md §AI)
- [ ] `bash scripts/tdd-test-hooks.sh` passes locally
- [ ] If a hook contract changed, the JSON shape change is documented
- [ ] If a deny pattern was added, the comment cites the CVE / incident
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated for any user-visible change
